page_content:
Credit Only Granted for: BIOE654 or BIOE658P.

Formerly: BIOE658P.

BIOE658 Special Topics in Bioengineering (M.Eng.) (1-3 Credits) Special topics in Bioengineering.

Restriction: Must be in the Master of Engineering program or Post- Baccalaureate Certificate of Engineering program; and permission of ENGR-Fischell Department of Bioengineering department. Repeatable to: 99 credits if content differs.
